rows.label: qev014406_MSG0001
rows.name:
This alarm sounds when there's an
anomaly in the purification plant...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_MSG0002
rows.name:
Don't tell me, that native
creature is back...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_MSG0003
rows.name:
Haa... haa... That thing... that's
the thing that attacked us...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_MSG0004
rows.name:
Those cocoons... it
emerged... from them...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_MSG0005
rows.name:
I hate this... I can't take this anymore...
Everyone... Ian... Where did you go...? I
want to return to NLA right now...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_JNK0010
rows.name: Encourage

rows.label: qev014406_SEL0011
rows.name: Give Ajoa courage.

rows.label: qev014406_JNK0020
rows.name: Present

rows.label: qev014406_SEL0021
rows.name: Show Ajoa the ID cards found on the monster's corpses.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_MSG0006
rows.name:
Thank you. I'm glad you came.
I'll have to thank Rosie too...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_MSG0007
rows.name:
Anyway, I have to check the
surveillance camera data and find
out what happened to the others...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_MSG0008
rows.name:
...Hey, was Ian outside? The surveillance
camera data is set up so it can only
be viewed with his ID card...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_MSG0009
rows.name:
...These are researchers' ID cards? Did
they all get eaten by those things...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_MSG0010
rows.name:
Ahh... I have to check the
surveillance camera data quickly...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_MSG0011
rows.name:
But... it seems the surveillance
camera data is set up so it can only
be viewed with Ian's ID card...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_MSG0012
rows.name:
...Wait, isn't that Ian's ID card? Did
the monster from earlier drop this too?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_MSG0013
rows.name: Yeah, with this, we can view the data...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_MSG0014
rows.name:
Right... hey, I'm sorry, but...
could you take a look at it first?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_MSG0015
rows.name: Please. I... feel somewhat sick...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_MSG0016
rows.name:
I want to go take a
shower... Is that okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev014406_SEL0031
rows.name: Let her go to the shower room.

rows.label: qev014406_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev014406_SEL0041
rows.name: Tell the pale Ajoa that it would be better to wait until she calms down.

rows.label: qev014406_MSG0017
rows.name:
Thank you. I'll return the ID
card then. Please extract the
data from that terminal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_MSG0018
rows.name:
The shower room only has a single door,
so I'll scream if anything happens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_MSG0019
rows.name: Don't hesitate to come in.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_MSG0020
rows.name:
Haa... I feel like my stamina would
recover if I took one, but if you
say so, it can't be helped.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_MSG0021
rows.name:
Let's take a look then. Please insert
this ID card into that terminal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_MSG0022
rows.name:
But... I wonder why...? My skin
is getting extremely dry. Ahh,
I want to soak in water...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_MSG0023
rows.name:
I'm so thirsty... My skin
is extremely dry too...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_MSG0024
rows.name:
My body is hot... I wonder
if I have a fever...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_MSG0025
rows.name:
Is my craving for water... because of
what was implanted in my body...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_MSG0026
rows.name:
Then what about the others? What about
everyone else...? The thing from earlier...
Are you saying that was them...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_JNK0050
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev014406_SEL0051
rows.name: Show concern for Ajoa's body.

rows.label: qev014406_JNK0060
rows.name: Cautious

rows.label: qev014406_SEL0061
rows.name: Stay vigilant in case Ajoa turns into a monster.

rows.label: qev014406_MSG0027
rows.name:
You... aren't you afraid of
me...? You're so kind...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_MSG0028
rows.name:
...Yeah, if I go back to NLA without taking in any
fluids and have the eggs inside my body surgically
removed... I'm sure... it will work out somehow...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_MSG0029
rows.name:
Don't look at me with those
eyes... You're terrible...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_MSG0030
rows.name:
It's fine... As long as I don't drink
water, the eggs shouldn't hatch...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_MSG0031
rows.name:
If I go back to NLA like this and have the
eggs inside my body surgically removed...
I'm sure... it will work out somehow...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014406_MSG0032
rows.name:
I'll be heading back first then...
Please tell Rosie that I survived...[ST:wait ]
